name: meridian-visa
description: Visa readiness loop for AI assistants. Look up corridor rules, file the application, fill trip details + documents, run a readiness check, dispatch Meridian Computer to fill the consulate's portal, book the appointment, record the outcome. Anonymous tools work without login (requirements_lookup, requirements_evaluate, requirements_submit_feedback). User-scoped tools (applications_*, appointments_*) prompt for OAuth via Meridian when first called.
